hero.subtitle: We export premium organic vegetables directly from our fields in Almería to your table.

eco.title: Certified organic production
eco.desc: Strictly complying with EU Bio regulations and international organic agriculture standards to ensure the purity of each product.

control.title: Direct control of origin
control.desc: We operate our own farms that ensure maximum quality, freshness, and total traceability from seed to final destination.

export.title: International export
export.desc: Efficient supply and optimized logistics to major European markets, guaranteeing freshness and commercial punctuality.

products.label: AGRICULTURAL EXCELLENCE
products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: We select the best sustainably grown varieties to guarantee authentic flavor and superior nutritional quality.

tomate.name: Tomato
tomate.desc: Varieties selected for their intense aroma and fleshy texture. Grown under the Mediterranean sun.

pimiento.name: Pepper
pimiento.desc: Freshness guaranteed from harvest to delivery. Available in red, green, and yellow varieties.

calabacin.name: Zucchini
calabacin.desc: Environmentally friendly cultivation, resulting in a tender product with thin skin.

commitment.title: Real commitment to sustainable agriculture
commitment.desc: We grow our vegetables following responsible agricultural practices that protect the soil, optimize water use and reduce environmental impact.

location.title: Strategic location
location.subtitle: Almería, Spain
location.caption: Headquarters
location.desc:
Our company is headquartered in Almería, one of Europe's main logistical centers for fruit and vegetable exports. From here we coordinate the distribution of our products to the main European markets.

The production is carried out in our own farms located in Morocco, where the climate allows us to grow high-quality organic vegetables all year round.

logistics.title: Efficient logistics
logistics.desc: Fast distribution to the main European markets thanks to an optimized logistics chain.

quality.title: Direct control of origin
quality.desc: Production on our own farms that guarantees traceability, constant quality, and control from cultivation to marketing.

noResults.title: No products found.

tomate-rama.name: Vine Tomato
tomate-rama.desc: Organic vine tomato, sun-ripened with an intense and authentic flavor.

tomate-cherry.name: Cherry Tomato
tomate-cherry.desc: Small, sweet, and crunchy. Perfect for salads and healthy snacks.

calabacin.name: Zucchini
calabacin.desc: Cylindrical green zucchini with a tender texture and shiny, blemish-free skin.

pepino.name: Cucumber
pepino.desc: Dutch type cucumber, dark green color, excellent freshness, and high hydration.

pimiento-california-rojo.name: Red California Pepper
pimiento-california-rojo.desc: Meaty and sweet organic pepper with a bright and intense red color.

pimiento-california-verde.name: Green California Pepper
pimiento-california-verde.desc: Very crunchy organic green pepper, ideal for cooking or eating raw.

pimiento-california-amarillo.name: Yellow California Pepper
pimiento-california-amarillo.desc: Juicy and mild-flavored organic pepper with a vibrant yellow color.

support.title: Commercial support
support.desc: Order tracking and coordination with international clients.

advice.title: Quality control

logistics.title: Logistics management

intro.title: About OrganicBio
intro.desc: Organic-Bio Agriculture SL is a company dedicated heart and soul to the production and marketing of organic vegetables. We operate from Almería, the garden of Europe, taking our healthy products to the most demanding international markets.

history.title: Our History and Mission
history.p1: We were born with a clear vision: to cultivate the future. We have grown firmly believing that organic agriculture is the only sustainable way to provide healthy food without compromising the resources of next generations.
history.p2: Our mission is to supply top-tier fruit and vegetable companies and distributors with real, traceable organic products of maximum freshness.

infrastructure.title: Infrastructure
infrastructure.desc: We control the complete process. From our own farms in Almería, where the sunlight works magic throughout the year, to our handling facilities.

list.item2: Climate-controlled warehouse to maintain the cold chain.
list.item4: Logistics alliances for fast international transport.

markets.title: Our Markets
markets.desc: Our main business volume is B2B export, sending the flavor and health of Spanish organic agriculture across Europe.

hero.title: We cultivate with responsibility and transparency,
hero.desc: respecting natural cycles to offer high-quality products and a sustainable agricultural model.

ecoProduction.subtitle: AGRICULTURAL EXCELLENCE
ecoProduction.title: Organic Production
ecoProduction.desc: Our methods preserve the ecosystem and guarantee products free of synthetic chemicals, maintaining the original purity of the fruit.

card1.title: Soil Health
card1.desc: Crop rotation and organic fertilizers to maintain the vitality of the land and its microbiological biodiversity.

card2.title: Zero Pesticides
card2.desc: Biological pest control using natural enemies, completely eliminating the use of harmful synthetic substances.

ecoProduction.imageBadge: 100% Certified under international food safety regulations.

eu.title: EU Organic
eu.desc: Guarantees that our products comply with strict European standards for organic production and environmental sustainability.

globalGap.title: Global G.A.P.
globalGap.desc: Certifies our good agricultural practices, ensuring traceability, food safety, and the welfare of our workers.

traceability.title: Total Traceability
traceability.subtitle: From the field to its destination, every step is monitored

quality.title: Quality and Traceability
quality.desc: We have an integrated quality control system from sowing to shipping.

item1.title: Farm Control
item1.desc: Constant monitoring of growth, resource optimization and strict use of biological control.

item2.title: Selection and Packaging
item2.desc: Automated process and manual supervision to ensure product caliber, color and optimal freshness.

item3.title: Total Traceability
item3.desc: Computerized system that allows knowing the exact origin (farm, lot, date) of each box sent.

sustainability.title: Real Sustainability
sustainability.desc: Organic farming is not just a label; it is a work philosophy that seeks to minimize the environmental footprint.

water.title: Efficient Water Management
water.desc: High-precision drip irrigation systems managed by humidity sensors, optimizing every drop in the arid environment of Almería.

soil.title: Soil Conservation
soil.desc: Crop rotation and organic fertilizer to maintain the natural fertility of the land and avoid degradation.

biodiversity.title: Biodiversity
biodiversity.desc: Exclusive use of auxiliary fauna (biological control) to combat pests, fostering a natural ecological balance in the greenhouses.

energy.title: Energy Reduction
energy.desc: Use of passive solar energy (the 'Miracle of Almería') without the use of fossil heating in the greenhouses.

waste.title: Waste Management
waste.desc: Recycling of plant remains for composting and integration of more sustainable and biodegradable packaging.

ProductDetail.description: Grown under strict organic standards in our Almería farms. Specially selected for B2B export and international markets demanding health and environment.

crop.title: Crop Information
crop.p1: Our product is grown in solar greenhouses in the province of Almería, making the most of natural light and using biological pest control techniques. We do not use synthetic pesticides or chemical fertilizers, ensuring a 100% natural product, respectful of biodiversity and safe for the consumer.
crop.p2: Each lot is rigorously inspected to ensure it meets European and North American quality standards for organic food.
